emails.subject: Re: Tristar Gas Marketing Company
emails.body: Re: Tristar Gas Marketing Company Debra, I noticed on one of the Deal #'s listed below, Deal 231047, is under the counterparty Duke Energy Field Services, Inc. I was wondering if that Deal is a type-o or if it should stand as is, since the subject is dealing with Tristar Gas Marketing Company I would think it should be different than what is listed? Please let me know. Thanks, Corey From: Debra Perlingiere ECT 04/12/2000 02:40 PM
